message:
type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Adding get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor method to ImageBlock class

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Extracting normalize_image_bytes helper for image_to_base64 in types.py

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added get_image_mimetype() method on ImageBlock (after resolve_image? no, right after image_to_base64); image_to_base64 now calls self.get_image_mimetype() instead of inline filetype.guess() before b64encode. Please compose your normalize_image_bytes extraction around this so image_to_base64 still calls get_image_mimetype() before encoding, to avoid clobbering.

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[encoded, decoded_for_guessing] above MessageRole; image_to_base64 now does 'self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image)' then 'filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing)' if no mimetype set. My working tree has no get_image_mimetype method (not present here) -- if you're merging, call get_image_mimetype using decoded_for_guessing from normalize_image_bytes rather than self.image, since self.image may already be base64-encoded and would break filetype detection.
